title: celtis lancifolia
intro: Celtis lancifolia, also known as the Mexican hackberry, is a deciduous tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that help to reduce swelling and fight infections. The health benefits of Celtis lancifolia include its ability to support cardiovascular health, lower blood pressure, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Celtis lancifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
